name: ucdp_v261_deaths
title: UCDP Conflict Deaths (v26.1)
description: Number of total fatalities resulting from conflict events based on the UCDP Georeferenced Event Dataset (GED) global version 26.1.

processing_options.description: Filter projects based on user selection and aggregate selected category of deaths

citation:
Sundberg, Ralph, and Erik Melander, 2013, 'Introducing the UCDP Georeferenced Event Dataset', Journal of Peace Research, vol.50, no.4, 523-532 
 Högbladh Stina, 2026, 'UCDP GED Codebook version 26.1', Department of Peace and Conflict Research, Uppsala University
